TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjacekes ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 83 buwan, 278 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 273 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan95%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjacekes hya' ga Pasumaq. tay 'zil na Tjacekes hya' ga Yungkilu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjaʦ~ʨekes~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan**%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjaʦ~ʨekes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa pas~ɕumaq. taj ʔzil na tjaʦ~ʨekes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa juŋkilu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tjacekes ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 83 buwan, 278 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 273 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan95%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjacekes hya' ga Pasumaq. tay 'zil na Tjacekes hya' ga Yungkilu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjaʦ~ʨekes~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan**%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjaʦ~ʨekes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa pas~ɕumaq. taj ʔzil na tjaʦ~ʨekes~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa juŋkilu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
